title: OpenDelve Error Envelope
description: Error-shape JSON envelope emitted when a command fails. Distinct from the success envelope (decision.schema.json) per eng review A4. Agents distinguish success vs error by the top-level 'kind' field: 'decision' | 'error'.

code.description: Machine-readable error code. Stable across versions. Examples: git_not_initialized, schema_unknown, pack_unknown, evidence_schema_mismatch, approval_already_signed, io_failed.

message.description: One-line human-readable error description. Lowercase, no trailing period (matches Go convention).

hint.description: Optional one-line suggested next action. Example: 'run git init to initialize a repo, then try again'.

docUrl.description: Optional link to documentation explaining this error.

details.description: Command-specific error context. Example: schema_validation_failed includes a 'failures' array with each failed assertion.

subject.description: Optional. Subject id when the error relates to a specific subject.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 of when the error occurred.
